describe.confidence_note: Well-grounded by deep research brief. 17 discrete steps, clear scope boundaries, 4 risk flags identified.

specify.confidence_note: Comprehensive spec with 10 WUs, 45 ACs, full agent prompts. Research brief grounded all design decisions. 3 open questions remain (threshold tuning, context brief length, anonymization effectiveness) — all appropriate for empirical validation during use.

challenge.confidence_note: Family mode 2 rounds. Architecture sound, 9 targeted changes + 4 refinements. No critical findings. CONVERGED at 0.91.

edge_cases.confidence_note: Family mode 1 round. 7 edge cases, all mechanical completions. 6 spec fixes, 3 interaction clusters. CONVERGED at 0.92.

premortem.confidence_note: 8 NEW operational findings, 11% overlap with Stages 3-4. PM-1 (context exhaustion) is critical — most likely real-world failure mode. Pre-mortem confirmed orthogonal failure class.

review.skip_reason: 3 adversarial stages complete with 23 findings across orthogonal failure classes. Confidence 0.85-0.92. Local challenge sufficient.

test.skip_reason: No executable code — all WUs are markdown command files. Behavioral eval coverage addressed by PM-5/R4.

execute.confidence_note: All 10 WUs implemented. test.sh passes (83/83). Blueprint.md extended with full critique mode section. Docs updated. Family mode deprecated. All adversarial findings (F1-F9, R1-R4, E1-E7, PM-1/PM-3/PM-4) incorporated into implementation.
